policies.detail: No refunds after 7 days of purchase. Within 7 days, full refund is available.
24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get email support only.
A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan. No credit card required.
You can upgrade from Basic to Pro anytime. Billing is prorated.

company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing for content creators
company.description: AutoStream uses AI to help content creators edit videos faster. Drop your footage, get a polished cut in minutes.
